ORDER APPOINTING CONSERVATOR OF PERSON AND ESTATE, $328,064.00 BOND REQUIRED GIANNETTI, LISA APPOINTED

PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF PERSON AND ESTATE, CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2005, GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER, ASSESSMENT FEE OF $690.00 ; ORDER PRESENTED BY MS. GERARD, MODIFIED BY COURT, ATTACHMENT 26 NOT USED. COURT IS AUTHORIZING A MAXIMUM OF $2,000.00 PER MONTH FOR CONSERVATOR, ACCOUNTING TO INCLUDE TIME AND SERVICES DECLARATION. COUNSEL STATES PETITIONER HAS COMPLETED BOTH CONSERVATORSHIP CLASSES AND HAS RECEIVED CERTIFICATE CONTINUED FROM AUG-18-2005 TO NOV-28-2005 AT 09:00 AM FOR FILING OF GENERAL PLAN CONTINUED FROM AUG-18-2005 TO NOV-28-2005 AT 09:00 AM FOR FILING OF INVENTORY CONTINUED FROM AUG-18-2005 TO SEP-25-2006 AT 09:00 AM FOR FILING OF STATUS REPORT CONTINUED FROM AUG-18-2005 TO SEP-25-2006 AT 09:00 AM FOR FILING OF FIRST ACCOUNT
